name: Itomimizu
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 306

Itomimizu is the announcer and commentator of the Davy Back Fight events. He is often seen riding a very large bird named Chuchuun to get a better view of the action. His name means tubifex worm, leading to many fans referring to him as simply 'Tubifex'.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
